key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to sample CPU stats. Lower values use more energy.

key.name: panel-metrics
key.summary: Metrics shown in the top-bar label
key.description: Any combination of: usage, temp, freq. Order is preserved in the label.

key.name: show-per-core-graph
key.summary: Show per-core sparkline in the menu

key.name: show-governor
key.summary: Show CPU governor row in the menu

key.name: show-rapl
key.summary: Show RAPL package power row (Intel only)
key.description: Requires read access to /sys/class/powercap/intel-rapl. Run setup/install-rapl-access.sh once.

key.name: show-throttle-alerts
key.description: Flashes the panel indicator and shows a banner row when any core throttles.
